atlas_800i_a3_per_npu_estimate.name: Huawei Atlas 800I A3 per-NPU estimate
atlas_800i_a3_per_npu_estimate.notes: Derived from the official 8-NPU server specification: 4.48 PFLOPS FP16, 8.96 POPS INT8, 8 * 128GB on-chip memory, 3.2TB/s memory bandwidth. Use npu-smi, CANN PlatformAscendC, and profiling artifacts for formal conclusions.

atlas_800t_a3_per_npu_estimate.name: Huawei Atlas 800T A3 per-NPU estimate
atlas_800t_a3_per_npu_estimate.notes: Derived from the official 8-NPU server specification: 6.0 PFLOPS FP16, 12.0 POPS INT8, 8 * 128GB on-chip memory, 3.2TB/s memory bandwidth.

atlas_300i_a2_64gb.name: Huawei Atlas 300I A2 64GB
atlas_300i_a2_64gb.notes: Official product page lists 280 TFLOPS FP16, 560 TOPS INT8, 64GB on-chip memory, and 1.6TB/s memory bandwidth.

atlas_300i_a2_32gb.name: Huawei Atlas 300I A2 32GB
atlas_300i_a2_32gb.notes: Official product page lists 280 TFLOPS FP16, 560 TOPS INT8, 32GB on-chip memory, and 0.8TB/s memory bandwidth.
